jobs.coldEmail: Subject: Senior marketer interested in your Growth Marketing Manager role\\n\\nHi there,\\n\\nI hope you had a good Eid break — I came across your role at Furchild and it genuinely lit me up - it lines up almost exactly with what I love doing in growth and performance marketing.\\n\\nA quick word about me - I'm Dubai-based, 10+ years in digital, growth and CRM across Majid Al Futtaim, L'Oreal and Samsung. Three things I'm especially proud of (and happy to talk through over a coffee):\\n- Hit 12.5x ROAS on paid media across 8 GCC markets while cutting CPA by 80%\\n- Rebuilt the CRM on a Bloomreach CDP spanning 1.7M+ customer profiles\\n- Grew email revenue 40x - Braze featured it as a global case study\\n\\nI'd love to be considered. I'm attaching my CV (Aliaa_Mohamed_CV_ATS_Growth_Marketing.docx) and happy to share specific case studies if useful. Would a quick 15-min chat work?\\n\\nWarm regards,\\nAliaa Mohamed\\nDubai, UAE  -  +971 56 261 7228  -  aliaa1994@hotmail.co.uk  -  linkedin.com/in/aliaa-mohamed-digital-marketing
